admin.federation.about_description: Federation allows users to be synchronized across multiple tenants in a group. This is useful for organizations with multiple branches or departments that need shared user access.
admin.federation.change_master.confirm_t: I understand that this operation will migrate all federated users to the new master tenant and cannot be easily undone.
admin.federation.change_master.descripti: Transfer the master role from the current tenant to another tenant in :group
admin.federation.change_master.selected_: :tenant will become the new master tenant for this federation group.
admin.federation.change_master.title: Change Master Tenant
admin.federation.change_master.warning: This is a critical operation. All federated users will be migrated to the new master tenant. This may take some time depending on the number of users.
admin.federation.create_description: Create a new federation group to sync users across tenants
admin.federation.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the group ":name"?
admin.federation.delete_has_users_error: Cannot delete a group that has federated users.
admin.federation.description: Manage user federation groups for multi-tenant user synchronization
admin.federation.disable_sync_confirm: Are you sure you want to disable synchronization for ":name"? User data will no longer be synchronized with this tenant.
admin.federation.dismiss_confirm: Are you sure you want to dismiss this conflict? The current value will be kept.
admin.federation.enable_sync_confirm: Are you sure you want to enable synchronization for ":name"? User data will be synchronized with this tenant.
admin.federation.federated_users_descrip: Users that are synced across tenants in this group
admin.federation.fields.name: Name
admin.federation.form.description_placeh: Describe the purpose of this federation group...
admin.federation.form.master_change_hint: To change the master tenant, use the Change Master option on the group detail page
admin.federation.form.master_hint: The master tenant is the authoritative source for user data
admin.federation.form.sync_settings_desc: Choose which user data should be synchronized
admin.federation.form.warning: Changes to sync settings will affect all federated users. Some changes may trigger data sync operations.
admin.federation.member_tenants_descript: Tenants that are part of this federation group
admin.federation.no_federated_users: No federated users in this group
admin.federation.no_groups_description: Create a federation group to start syncing users across tenants.
admin.federation.no_pending_conflicts_de: All conflicts have been resolved. Great job!
admin.federation.no_tenant_links: No tenant links for this user
admin.federation.no_tenants: No tenants in this federation group
admin.federation.notes_placeholder: Add any notes about this resolution...
admin.federation.rejoin_confirm: Are you sure you want to add ":name" back to this federation group?
admin.federation.remove_tenant_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove ":name" from this federation group? User links will be deleted.
admin.federation.resolve_conflict_descri: Choose how to resolve the :field conflict for :user
admin.federation.retry_sync_confirm: Are you sure you want to retry all failed syncs?
admin.federation.settings.auto_create_on: Automatically create local user when a federated user logs into a branch tenant for the first time
admin.federation.settings.auto_federate_: Automatically federate new users when they are created in member tenants
admin.federation.sync_strategy.descripti: Choose how data conflicts between tenants should be resolved
admin.federation.sync_strategy.last_writ: The most recent change takes precedence regardless of source
admin.federation.sync_strategy.manual_re: All conflicts require manual resolution by an administrator
admin.federation.sync_strategy.master_wi: Changes from the master tenant always take precedence over other tenants
admin.federation.sync_strategy.title: Sync Strategy
admin.federation.tenant_links_descriptio: All tenants where this user is synchronized
admin.federation.title: Federation Groups
